titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 32: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 32. (A.R. No. 384 of 1913.) EṞUMBŪR, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine, Kadambavanēśvara temple.

This inscription records the raising of the śrī-vimānam (central shrine) in stone and the construction of the eight attendant gōpurams for the god (Perumānaḍigaḷ) of the small temple (chiṟu-ttirukkōyil) at Urumūr, a dēvadānam in Nalvayalūrkkūṟṟam on the northern bank (of the river Koḷḷiḍam ?) by Iruṅkōḷaṉ Guṇavaṉ Aparājitaṉ. The latter also endowed three and a quarter vēli of land duly freed from taxes as the capital for maintaining the services in that temple (uṇṇāḻigaippuṟam), after duly supplicating the overlord (perumāṉaḍigaḷ) Chōḷa Parāntaka. The three and a quarter vēli of land was composed of three vēli, in the village Kārai Vāḻkkaiyilāṉpāḍi and one quarter chey (vēli) in the village Charukkai. The inscription also records that besides this, the donor made a grant of another three and quarter vēli of land apparently freed from taxes, in two plots with the customary water rights, in two villages. Out of this, three vēli of land was in Āḷpāḍi and a quarter vēli of land in Dugaiyāḷ. They were earmarked for the following purposes.
1. One and a quarter vēli of land for meeting the expenses of the entire worship (tiruchchennaḍaippuṟam).
2. One chey (one vēli) for the livelihood of the worshipping priests (archaṉābhōgam).
3. One chey for the maintenance of the drummers (tiruppalipuṟam).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭa kopparakesarivanmarkku yāṇṭu [2 10 8] Irupatteṭṭā
vatu vaṭakarai nalvayalūrkkūṟṟattut tevatānam Uṟumurc ciṟut tirukkoyil
perumānaṭikaḷukku śrī vimānaṅ kaṟṟaḷiyeṭuppittu Aṣṭaparivāra kopurañ
ceyvittu Uṭaiār coḻapperumaāṉaṭikaḷ parāntakadevarkku Iruṅkoḷa
ṉ kuṇavaṉa parājitaṉ viṇṇappañ ceyya Aruḷuppaṭṭāṟ Uṇṇāḻikaippuṟañce
yta nilam Innāṭṭuk kāraivāḻkkaiyilāṉ pāṭiyeṉnum perāl nila muveli
Orāttiyarkku veliyennum corvum Iṉnu minnāṭṭuc carukkaiyāṉ kuṭikkāṟc ceyyumaāka muṉṟe kā
l Immuṉṟe kālumiṟaiyiḻitti Iṟaiyiliyāka Udakapurvañ ceytu kuṭutteṉ ciṟuttirukkoyil bhaṭṭārarkku Iruṅkoḷaṉ ku
ṇavaṉaparājitanen Innila muṉṟe kālum candrādityavaṟ Iṟaiyili yākavum Innam Āḷpāṭiyāṉa nilattukkellai kiḻ
pāṟkkellai veḷiyakkuṭi Ellaikku meṟkkum teṉ pāṟkkellai piṭavūr nāṭṭu veṇṭalaiyūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum kiḻak
ku nokkic ciṟṟalai veḷūrkke pāynta vāykkāliṉ vaṭakku mel pāṟkellai pūtaṉkuṭiyellaikkuk kiḻak
kum vaṭapāṟkkellai veḷiyakkuṭikke kiḻakkup pāynta vāykkāliṉ nerkkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭṭa ni
la mikitikkuṟaivuḷḷoṭuṅka muveliyum tukkaiyāḷ kuṭikkāṟc ceyyumāka muṉṟe kāl Immuṉṟe kāṟ ceyyilum tirucennaṭai
ppuṟam Oṉṟe kālum Accaṉā(o)bhogam velic ceyum tiruppalipuṟam Uvaccarkaḷukku veli(c)ceyum tiruppalipuṟamākavun nila
ttukku nir pāyum vāykāliraṇṭālum(ñ) cuṭṭappaṭṭa vāykkāl Innila muvelikku nirkkintavāṟup pāyccavu miṟaikkavum peṟuvatākavu minnila
muḻutu kuṭikaḷuk kotoṭṭuḷḷa vuṭaiyi Epperpaṭṭatun tevare tāvukavum muḻuta kuṭikaḷ paṭṭiyuṅku vai
yum Amaiñca potipa kaṭṭātatākavu mipparitu parihāramum vyavastayumākac ceytu kuṭutteṉ(k) kuṇavan Aparājitaneṉ nivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ivai paṉmāhesvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
